title: Exception for past debarred individuals
text: The restrictions under (a) and (b) above shall not apply to the persons or entities mentioned therein, who were debarred in the past by the Board and the period of debarment is already over as on the date of filing of the draft offer document with the Board.
notes: Exception for past debarred individuals with expired debarment period.

source.span_hint: The restrictions under (a) and (b) above shall not apply to the persons or entities mentioned

title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
text: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer if there are any outstanding convertible securities or any other right which would entitle any person with any option to receive equity shares of the issuer.
notes: Your ESOP/SAR/mandatory conversion carve-outs match this.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall not be eligible to make an initial public offer if there are any outstanding convertible securities

title: Proviso: excess monetary assets utilization
text: Provided that if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project.
notes: Check for utilization of excess monetary assets.

source.span_hint: if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets

title: Proviso: monetary assets limit in-cash IPO
text: Provided further that the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.
notes: Exception for cash-only IPOs.

source.span_hint: the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable

title: SR equity shareholder net worth calculation
text: Explanation: While determining the individual net worth of the SR shareholder, his investment/ shareholding in other listed companies shall be considered but not that of his shareholding in the issuer company.
notes: Net worth calculation excludes issuer shareholding.

source.span_hint: Explanation: While determining the individual net worth of the SR shareholder

title: SR equity share condition: issuance to executives
text: iii. The SR shares were issued only to the promoters/ founders who hold an executive position in the issuer company.
notes: SR shares only to executive promoters/founders.

source.span_hint: The SR shares were issued only to the promoters/ founders who hold an executive position

title: SR equity share condition: special resolution approval
text: iv. The issue of SR equity shares had been authorized by a special resolution passed at a general meeting of the shareholders of the issuer, where the notice calling for such general meeting specifically provided for - a. the size of issue of SR equity shares, b. ratio of voting rights of SR equity shares vis-à-vis the ordinary shares, c. rights as to differential dividends, if any d. sunset provisions, which provide for a time frame for the validity of such SR equity shares, e. matters in respect of which the SR equity shares would have the same voting right as that of the ordinary shares.
notes: Check for special resolution with specified parameters.

source.span_hint: the issue of SR equity shares had been authorized by a special resolution

title: SR equity share condition: pre-IPO holding period
text: v. The SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing of draft red herring prospectus and held for a period of at least three months prior to the filing of the red herring prospectus;
notes: SR shares must be held for at least 3 months before filing.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing of draft red herring prospectus

title: SR equity share condition: voting rights ratio
text: vi. The SR equity shares shall have voting rights in the ratio of a minimum of 2:1 upto a maximum of 10:1 compared to ordinary shares and such ratio shall be in whole numbers only.
notes: Voting rights ratio between 2:1 and 10:1 (whole numbers).

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall have voting rights in the ratio

title: SR equity share condition: face value equality
text: vii. The SR equity shares shall have the same face value as the ordinary shares.
notes: SR equity shares must have same face value as ordinary shares.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall have the same face value as the ordinary shares

title: SR equity share condition: equivalence to ordinary shares
text: ix. The SR equity shares shall be equivalent to ordinary equity shares in all respects, except for having superior voting rights.
notes: SR equity shares equivalent to ordinary shares except voting rights.

source.span_hint: The SR equity shares shall be equivalent to ordinary equity shares in all respects

title: Name change with 50% revenue from new activity
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.
notes: Map to name_change and revenue_percentage >= 50% (restated, consolidated basis).

source.span_hint: if it has changed its name

title: Eligibility: book-building process required
text: The issue is made through the book-building process.
notes: Map to issue_type = book_building.

source.span_hint: eligible only if the issue is made through the book-building process

title: Eligibility: allotment guarantee to QIBs
text: The issuer undertakes to allot at least seventy five per cent. of the net offer to qualified institutional buyers and to refund the full subscription money if it fails to do so.
notes: Map to allotment_to_QIBs >= 75% and refund_obligation.

source.span_hint: undertakes to allot at least seventy five per cent

title: Acquisition/investment purpose limit
text: The amount for acquisition or investment where target not identified shall not exceed thirty five per cent of the amount being raised by the issuer.
notes: Map to acquisition_investment_amount <= 35%

source.span_hint: shall not exceed thirty five per cent

title: Acquisition/investment limit exception
text: The amount raised for acquisition or investment where target not identified shall not exceed twenty five per cent if target identified with disclosures.
notes: Map to acquisition_investment_amount <= 25% with disclosure check.

source.span_hint: Provided that the amount raised for such objects

title: Holding period calculation for converted shares
text: For equity shares received on conversion/exchange, combined holding period of convertible securities and resultant equity shares shall be considered.
notes: Map to combined_holding_period >= 1 year for converted shares.

source.span_hint: the holding period of such convertible securities

title: Holding period compliance timing
text: The one-year holding period requirement shall be complied with at the time of filing draft offer document.
notes: Map to holding_period_compliance_at_filing.

source.span_hint: Provided further that such holding period

title: Lock-in exemption: Infrastructure entities
text: Lock-in requirement shall not apply to offers for sale of government company/statutory authority/corporation/SVP in infrastructure sector.
notes: Map to exempt_from_lock_in for infrastructure entities.

source.span_hint: a) in case of an offer for sale of a government company

title: Lock-in exemption: Approved scheme shares
text: Lock-in requirement shall not apply to equity shares acquired pursuant to scheme approved by High Court/tribunal/Central Government under Companies Act sections.
notes: Map to exempt_from_lock_in for shares from approved schemes.

source.span_hint: b) if the equity shares offered for sale were acquired

title: Lock-in exemption: Bonus issue shares
text: Lock-in requirement shall not apply to equity shares issued under bonus issue from free reserves if held for at least one year.
notes: Map to exempt_from_lock_in for bonus issue shares from free reserves.

source.span_hint: c) if the equity shares offered for sale were issued

title: Lock-in: High shareholders (>20%)
text: Shares offered by shareholders holding >20% pre-issue shareholding shall not exceed 50% of their pre-issue shareholding.
notes: Map to max_offer_for_high_sharers <= 50%

source.span_hint: a. shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding

title: Lock-in: Small shareholders (<=20%)
text: Shares offered by shareholders holding <=20% pre-issue shareholding shall not exceed 10% of pre-issue shareholding.
notes: Map to max_offer_for_small_sharers <= 10%

source.span_hint: b. shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding

title: Lock-in: Applicability for high shareholders
text: Provisions of regulation 17 for lock-in shall apply to shareholders holding >20% pre-issue shareholding.
notes: Map to apply_lock_in_for_high_sharers.

source.span_hint: c. for shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent

title: Lock-in relaxation inapplicable
text: Relaxation from lock-in as per regulation 17 clause (c) shall not be applicable.
notes: Map to no_lock_in_relaxation_applied.

source.span_hint: and relaxation from lock-in as provided under clause (c) of regulation 17

title: Cumulative calculation for lock-in
text: The limits for share offers shall be calculated cumulatively with reference to shareholding as on draft offer filing date.
notes: Map to cumulative_calculation for lock-in limits.

source.span_hint: 36[Explanation.- The limits set out in (a) and (b) above shall be calculated with reference to

title: Eligibility: Convertible debt without prior equity
text: An issuer shall be eligible to make initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without prior equity public issue and listing.
notes: Map to is_eligible_without_prior_equity.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without making a prior public issue

title: Eligibility: No default on debt payments
text: It is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for debt instruments issued to public.
notes: Map to no_debt_default for 6 months.

source.span_hint: Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest

title: Additional requirement: Credit rating
text: An issuer making initial public offer of convertible debt instruments shall have obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency.
notes: Map to has_credit_rating.

source.span_hint: it has obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency

title: Additional requirement: Debenture redemption reserve
text: An issuer making initial public offer of convertible debt instruments shall create debenture redemption reserve as per Companies Act and rules.
notes: Map to has_debenture_redemption_reserve.

source.span_hint: it shall create a debenture redemption reserve

title: Additional requirement: Security consent
text: For secured convertible debt, issuer shall ensure assets are sufficient, free from encumbrance, with consent of existing lenders if security exists.
notes: Map to security_requirements for secured debt.

source.span_hint: if the issuer proposes to create a charge or security on its assets

title: Promoters' contribution: equity or convertible securities
text: a) the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent. as stipulated in sub-regulation (1), either by way of equity shares or by way of subscription to convertible securities: Provided that if the price of the equity shares allotted pursuant to conversion is not pre-determined and not disclosed, the promoters shall contribute only by way of subscription to the convertible securities being issued in the public issue and shall undertake in writing to subscribe to the equity shares pursuant to conversion of such securities.
notes: Promoters must contribute 20% via equity or convertible securities. If conversion price not pre-determined, must use convertible securities.

source.span_hint: promoters shall contribute twenty per cent

title: Promoters' contribution: conversion price for convertible securities
text: b) in case of any issue of convertible securities which are convertible or exchangeable on different dates and if the promoters’ contribution is by way of equity shares (conversion price being pre-determined), such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of the equity share capital arising out of conversion of such securities.
notes: For convertible securities with varying conversion dates, promoters' equity contribution must not be below the weighted average conversion price.

source.span_hint: conversion price being pre-determined

title: Promoters' contribution: minimum equity for convertible debt IPOs
text: c) subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above, in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue of equity shares, the promoters shall bring in a contribution of at least twenty per cent. of the project cost in the form of equity shares, subject to contributing at least twenty per cent. of the issue size from their own funds in the form of equity shares.
notes: For convertible debt IPOs without prior equity public issue, promoters must contribute at least 20% of project cost as equity, with at least 20% of issue size from their own funds.

source.span_hint: convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue

title: Promoters' compliance deadline
text: (3) The promoters shall satisfy the requirements of this regulation at least one day prior to the date of opening of the issue.
notes: Promoters must comply with the contribution requirements at least one day before the IPO opens.

source.span_hint: at least one day prior to the date of opening

title: Escrow account for promoters' contribution
text: (4) In case the promoters have to subscribe to equity shares or convertible securities towards minimum promoters’ contribution, the amount of promoters’ contribution shall be kept in an escrow account with a scheduled commercial bank, which shall be released to the issuer along with the release of the issue proceeds: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution has already been brought in and utilised, the issuer shall give the cash flow statement disclosing the use of such funds in the offer document; Provided further that where the minimum promoters’ contribution is more than one hundred crore rupees and the initial public offer is for partly paid shares, the promoters shall bring in at least one hundred crore rupees before the date of opening of the issue and the remaining amount may be brought on a pro-rata basis before the calls are made to the public.
notes: Promoters' contribution must be held in escrow unless already utilised. For contributions over ₹100 crore, at least ₹100 crore must be paid before IPO opens.

source.span_hint: kept in an escrow account

title: Ineligible securities: infrastructure companies
text: (c) specified securities allotted to the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s), during the preceding one year at a price less than the issue price, against funds brought in by them during that period, in case of an issuer formed by conversion of one or more partnership firms or limited liability partnerships, where the partners of the erstwhile partnership firms or limited liability partnerships are the promoters of the issuer and there is no change in the management:
notes: Securities acquired by certain entities against funds contributed by them in a converted partnership firm are ineligible if acquired at issue price.

source.span_hint: acquired against funds brought in

title: Ineligible securities: pledged securities
text: (d) specified securities pledged with any creditor.
notes: Pledged securities are ineligible for minimum promoters' contribution.

source.span_hint: pledged with any creditor

title: Promoters must pay difference if acquired securities at lower price
text: if the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s), as applicable, pay to the issuer the difference between the price at which the specified securities are offered in the initial public offer and the price at which the specified securities had been acquired;
notes: Map to promoter_contribution and price_difference_calculation.

source.span_hint: promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with

title: Acquired securities under scheme must be approved by High Court/tribunal/Central Government
text: if such specified securities are acquired in terms of the scheme under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013, as approved by a High Court or a tribunal or the Central Government, as applicable, by the promoters in lieu of business and invested capital that had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to such approval;
notes: Map to promoter_contribution and approval_requirements.

source.span_hint: acquired in terms of the scheme under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013

title: Price adjustment for corporate actions in minimum promoters' contribution
text: Explanation.- For the purpose of this sub-regulation, it is clarified that the price per share for determining securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution, shall be determined, after adjusting the same for corporate actions such as share split, bonus issue, etc. undertaken by the issuer;
notes: Map to price_calculation and corporate_actions.

source.span_hint: price per share for determining securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution

title: Specified securities pledged with creditor
text: specified securities pledged with any creditor.
notes: Map to promoter_contribution and pledged_securities.

source.span_hint: specified securities pledged with any creditor

title: Eligibility of specified securities for promoters' contribution
text: Specified securities referred to in clauses (a) and (c) of sub-regulation (1) shall be eligible for the computation of promoters’ contribution if such securities are acquired pursuant to a scheme which has been approved by a High Court or a tribunal or the Central Government under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013.
notes: Map to promoter_contribution and approval_requirements.

source.span_hint: Specified securities referred to in clauses (a) and (c) of sub-regulation (1)

title: Minimum promoters' contribution lock-in period (18 months)
text: minimum promoters’ contribution including contribution made by alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) referred to in proviso to sub-regulation (1) of regulation 14, shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer;
notes: Map to promoter_lock_in_period and minimum_contribution.

source.span_hint: minimum promoters’ contribution including contribution made by alternative investment funds

title: Minimum promoters' contribution lock-in period (3 years if majority proceeds for capital expenditure)
text: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be three years from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to capital_expenditure and extended_lock_in_period.

source.span_hint: in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure

title: Excess promoters' holdings lock-in period (6 months)
text: promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to excess_promoter_shares and lock_in_period.

source.span_hint: promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in

title: Excess promoters' holdings lock-in period (1 year if majority proceeds for capital expenditure)
text: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be one year from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to capital_expenditure and extended_lock_in_period.

source.span_hint: in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure

title: Non-promoters' pre-issue capital lock-in period (6 months)
text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer;
notes: Map to non_promoter_lock_in_period.

source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in

title: Carve-out: Employee stock options
text: nothing contained in this regulation shall apply to: a) equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not, under an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme of the issuer prior to the initial public offer, if the issuer has made full disclosures with respect to such options or scheme in accordance with Part A of Schedule VI;
notes: Map to employee_stock_options and disclosure_requirements.

source.span_hint: equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not

title: Carve-out: Employee stock option trust transfers
text: equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to the employees by an employee stock option trust pursuant to exercise of options by the employees, whether currently employees or not, in accordance with the employee stock option plan or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation rights scheme.
notes: Map to employee_stock_options and trust_transfers.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to the employees

title: Carve-out: Venture capital fund shares
text: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of category I or Category II or a foreign venture capital investor: Provided that such equity shares shall be locked in for a period of six months from the date of purchase by the venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of Category I or Category II or foreign venture capital investor.
notes: Map to venture_capital_shares and lock_in_period.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund

title: Compliance with SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits) Regulations
text: the equity shares allotted to the employees shall be subject to the provisions of lock-in as specified under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.
notes: Map to employee_stock_options and lock_in_compliance.

source.span_hint: equity shares allotted to the employees shall be subject to the provisions of lock-in

title: Minimum promoter contribution lock-in period
text: The specified securities held by promoters shall not be transferable for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to is_promoter + lock_in_period=18months

source.span_hint: minimum promoters' contribution shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months

title: Minimum promoter contribution lock-in period for capital expenditure
text: If majority issue proceeds (excluding offer for sale) are for capital expenditure, the lock-in period for minimum promoters' contribution shall be three years from the date of allotment.
notes: Map to capital_expenditure + lock_in_period=36months

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds... shall be three years

title: Excess promoter holding lock-in period
text: Promoters' holding in excess of minimum promoters' contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to excess_promoter_shares + lock_in_period=6months

source.span_hint: promoters' holding in excess... shall be locked-in for a period of six months

title: Excess promoter holding lock-in period for capital expenditure
text: If majority issue proceeds (excluding offer for sale) are for capital expenditure, the lock-in period for excess promoters' holding shall be one year from the date of allotment.
notes: Map to capital_expenditure + excess_promoter_shares + lock_in_period=12months

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the majority... shall be one year

title: Non-promoter pre-issue capital lock-in period
text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to non_promoter_shares + lock_in_period=6months

source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in

title: Green shoe option stabilizing agent securities exemption
text: Lock-in provisions shall not apply to specified securities lent to stabilizing agent for green shoe option during the lending period or until returned.
notes: Map to green_shoe_option + stabilizing_agent + no_lock_in_during_lending_period

source.span_hint: The lock-in provisions shall not apply... during the period starting from the date of lending

title: Partly paid-up securities lock-in period
text: If specified securities are partly paid-up and not pari passu, lock-in shall end only after they become pari passu with public shares, three years from that date.
notes: Map to partly_paid_up_shares + not_pari_passu + lock_in_period=3years_from_pari_passu_date

source.span_hint: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in are partly paid-up... lock-in shall end only on the expiry of three years

title: Inscription of non-transferability on lock-in securities
text: Certificates of specified securities subject to lock-in shall contain 'non-transferable' inscription and specify the lock-in period. For dematerialized shares, lock-in must be recorded by depository.
notes: Map to lock_in_securities + non_transferable_inscription + lock_in_period_specification + dematerialized_shares_lock_in_recording

source.span_hint: The certificates of specified securities... shall contain the inscription 'non-transferable'

title: Pledging of locked-in specified securities
text: Specified securities held by promoters and locked-in may be pledged as collateral for loans to the issuer or its subsidiaries, provided certain conditions are met.
notes: Map to promoters + lock_in_securities + pledge_as_collateral + conditions_on_loan_purpose

source.span_hint: Specified securities held by the promoters and locked-in may be pledged as a collateral security

title: Holding period calculation for converted securities
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to conversion of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities, the holding period of such convertible securities as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period, convertible securities shall be deemed to be fully paid-up, if the entire consideration payable thereon has been paid and no further consideration is payable at the time of their conversion.
notes: Maps to lock_in holding period calculation for converted securities.

source.span_hint: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted

title: Holding period for bonus issue with conditions
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such eqvbvuity shares have resulted pursuant to a bonus issue, then the holding period of such equity shares against which the bonus issue is made as well as holding period of resultant bonus equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period, subject to the following: (a) that the bonus shares being issued out of free reserves and share premium existing in the books of account as at the end of the financial year preceding the financial year in which the draft offer document is filed with the Board; and (b) that the bonus shares not being issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits of the issuer.
notes: Includes conditions for bonus issue calculation.

source.span_hint: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted

title: Equity shares include ESOP/SAR allotted shares
text: For the purpose of clauses (a) and (b), equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted pursuant to a bonus issue against equity shares allotted pursuant to an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme.
notes: Maps to equity_shares including those from incentive schemes.

source.reg: For the purpose of clauses (a) and (b)
source.span_hint: equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted

title: Transferability of specified securities (except SR equity shares)
text: The specified securities held by promoters and locked-in as per regulation 16 may be transferred to another promoter or any person of the promoter group or a new promoter and the specified securities held by persons other than the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 17 may be transferred to any other person holding the specified securities which are locked-in.
notes: Maps to securities_held (promoters, others) and transferability conditions.

source.span_hint: specified securities held by the promoters and locked-in

title: Transfer conditions for specified securities
text: The specified securities held by promoters and locked-in as per regulation 16 may be transferred to another promoter or any person of the promoter group or a new promoter and the specified securities held by persons other than the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 17 may be transferred to any other person holding the specified securities which are locked-in.
notes: Maps to transfer conditions (promoters, other persons) and lock-in requirements.

source.span_hint: may be transferred to another promoter or any person

title: Continuation of lock-in period on transferred securities
text: The lock-in on such specified securities shall continue for the remaining period with the transferee and such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer them till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Maps to lock-in_period_continuation and transfer_eligibility.

source.span_hint: lock-in on such specified securities shall continue

title: Eligibility of transferee during lock-in period
text: The transferee shall not be eligible to transfer the specified securities till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Maps to transfer_eligibility and lock-in_period.

source.span_hint: such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer

title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
text: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.
notes: Maps to lead_managers appointment (at least one, registered).

source.span_hint: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers

title: Disclosure of lead manager roles and obligations
text: Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager, the rights, obligations and responsibilities, relating inter alia to disclosures, allotment, refund and underwriting obligations, if any, of each lead manager shall be predetermined and be disclosed in the draft offer document and the offer document as specified in Schedule I.
notes: Maps to lead_managers_roles_disclosure (predetermined, draft offer, offer document).

source.span_hint: rights, obligations and responsibilities shall be predetermined

title: Lead manager not being an associate of issuer
text: At least one lead manager to the issue shall not be an associate (as defined under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Merchant Bankers) Regulations, 1992) of the issuer.
notes: Maps to lead_managers not being associate (at least one).

source.span_hint: At least one lead manager to the issue shall not be an associate

title: Disclosure and role limitation for associate lead manager
text: If any of the lead manager is an associate of the issuer, it shall disclose itself as an associate of the issuer and its role shall be limited to marketing of the issue.
notes: Maps to lead_managers being associate (disclose, role limited to marketing).

source.span_hint: if any of the lead manager is an associate of the issuer

title: Appointment of other intermediaries
text: The issuer shall, in consultation with the lead manager(s), appoint other intermediaries which are registered with the Board after the lead manager(s) have independently assessed the capability of other intermediaries to carry out their obligations.
notes: Maps to other_intermediaries appointment (consultation, independent assessment).

source.span_hint: The issuer shall, in consultation with the lead manager(s)

title: Agreement with lead manager(s)
text: The issuer shall enter into an agreement with the lead manager(s) in the format specified in Schedule II and enter into agreements with other intermediaries as required under the respective regulations applicable to the intermediary concerned.
notes: Maps to agreements (lead manager format, other intermediaries requirements).

source.span_hint: The issuer shall enter into an agreement with the lead manager(s)

title: Additional clauses in agreements
text: Such agreements may include such other clauses as the issuer and the intermediaries may deem fit without diminishing or limiting in any way the liabilities and obligations of the lead manager(s).
notes: Maps to agreements flexibility (additional clauses, no diminishment of liabilities).

source.span_hint: Provided that such agreements may include such other clauses
